title: Four Ancient Element
description: Four Ancient Elements, you can make Elementary Swords with this mod
body:
![Craftingrecipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea031b4c7f4db420b3f21559bf456775a83e2260_0.webp)![Craftingrecipe2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0572dd6aefd80a28d5ade566b29d46006f3dc2fb_0.webp)![Craftingrecipe3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ddf748300c555fd8ab4deba954e92e4d1995222_0.webp)![Craftingrecipe4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93a5da5d726acabe1c4a96a206f4ec0a39071c8d_0.webp)🔥 📜 The Four Ancient Elements – and the Fifth![CraftingRecipe5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d3508fc382c5a72bf90e30f85d82f2577687425_0.webp)![Just For Fun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cd6adad8d21450bb177a565502bd1efa8a414c9_0.webp)

Long ago, when the world was still young, the primal forces of nature were forged into blades. Each sword carries the spirit of its element, waiting for a worthy warrior to awaken its true might.

🔥 Fire Sword – Flame’s Wrath

Forged in the heart of a volcano, this blade blazes with endless fury.

Right-click: Unleashes a scorching fireball, reducing enemies to ash.

Hit effect: Sets foes ablaze with every strike.

Those who wield it command the wrath of fire itself.

💧 Water Sword – Tide’s Whisper

Cooled in the depths of forgotten oceans, this blade flows with quiet lethality.

Right-click: Casts a poison potion, weakening enemies from afar.

Hit effect: Delivers steady, reliable damage.

Like water, it seeps into every crack, wearing foes down over time.

🌪️ Wind Sword – Sound of the Wind

Carved from the storm, this blade sings with the voice of the skies.

Right-click (entity): Fires a Wind Charge, striking with force and fierce knockback.

Right-click (ground): Summons a gust that lifts the wielder into the air.

Swift as the gale, it grants freedom to those who dare to ride the wind.

🌱 Earth Sword – Peace of the Earth

Born from the roots of the oldest forests, this blade carries the weight of the land.

Right-click (ground): Calls forth the blessing of growth, making plants flourish instantly.

Hit effect: Standard strike, but with a 10% chance to erase a creature from existence.

Firm as stone, patient as soil, yet merciless when fate decides.

🌌 Elemental Sword – The Blade of Balance

When the four elements unite, their powers converge into a single relic: the Elemental Sword.

Right-click: Channels the destructive fireball, the poisonous tide, the crushing wind, and the blessing of growth.

Hit effect: Strikes with the combined fury of flame, water, wind, and earth – even carrying the chance to despawn enemies.

This sword is said to be the key to harmony… or to the world’s undoing.

(And we have a JumpStick for Supermans)
